## Description

<!-- Describe what this PR adds or changes -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New idea(s)
- [ ] New resource(s)
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, outdated content)
- [ ] Automated discovery PR (created by workflow)
- [ ] Infrastructure (scripts, workflows, templates)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] No "guaranteed income", "passive income", "easy money", "make $10k", "no effort", "automatic revenue", "risk-free", "secret method" language
- [ ] Every new idea has a specific target user (not "anyone" or "businesses")
- [ ] Every new idea has at least one validation step
- [ ] Ideas in regulated domains (health, finance, legal) have `compliance_notes`
- [ ] YAML validates without errors (`python scripts/validate_yaml.py`)
- [ ] No duplicate IDs
- [ ] Links are valid
